reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe if you don't have flat feet!
reviews.text:
The amount of comfort in this shoe is amazing. It competes easily with $130 overpronation shoes I own aside from no arch support. That's where it failed completely for me. Already tried replacing the insoles with arch support ones but the comfort level wasn't the same sadly. The provided insole is removable but is tacked down with adhesive. Didn't damage the shoes when removing it and with care I was able to put it back in.

So in conclusion, yes these are amazing shoes if you need some overpronation support or if your gait is neutral. In this case I'd highly recommend but sadly it didn't work for me. The shoes look amazing and they feel amazing. The price with the construction of the shoes is an amazing value if you just need some extra support and cushion. I'd consider this shoe to be plush in the midsole and the insole was comfortable but not a lot to make it heavy. If it weren't for my arch I would of ordered another shoe to keep in storage when this one wears out. Great service as usual from Amazon for the free return.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT
reviews.text: I wore Asics 20 years ago and they fit me the best of any running shoe. I stopped running and used other shoes for walking. I recently purchased these due to a better price and I love walking in them.

title: Xero Shoes Men's HFS Running Shoes - Zero Drop, Lightweight & Barefoot Feel
features: A NEW LIGHTWEIGHT road running shoe. Foot-shaped for comfort. Built for speed!
Made in the USA or Imported
GRIP + COMFORT - Flexible to support natural foot motion, and grippy with its tire tread-inspired FeelTrue rubber sole

SHAPED FOR COMFORT, BUILT FOR SPEED - Xero HFS features a lightweight, minimalist build that contours to the shape of your feet. Its spacious toe-box allows you to splay, spread, and relax your toes for superior comfort
XERO DROP SOLE FOR PERFECT POSTURE - The Xero Drop sole offers a non-elevated heel and is low-to-the-ground - this allows for proper posture, balance, and agility for all-round performance

FLEX YOUR FEET, FEEL THE FLOOR - Our tire tread inspired patented 5.5mm FeelTrue sole strikes a balance between just-right protection and feedback - it delivers heel to toe cues to the brain for your best run ever. Allows your feet to bend and flex as nature intended

TRAVEL FRIENDLY, 5000 MILE WARRANTY - Xero HFS’ extra-durable construction is backed by our 5,000 Mile Feel the World Sole Promise. Being ultra-flexible, you can roll ‘em up and put in your pack or pocket for compact storage and easy travel
VEGAN FRIENDLY - Xero Shoes believes in promoting healthy and sustainable lifestyles which is why the HFS is made with zero animal products

reviews.title: Surpassed My Expectations
reviews.text: I feel like now I can write an honest review. I have run for years, 3 5k per week. My go to shoes were NB or Brooks and I loved them. Started seeing Xero Shoes pop up on social media and YouTube. I looked them for months and it seemed like a gimmick product. After some time I said ok I am going to try this shoe and see if they meet their hype. In July of this year I ordered the Prio Cross Trainer model. Now their instructions said adjust over a couple of weeks. Well I said hell no and put them to the test right out of the box. I wore them every chance I got for 30 days straight. I found them comfortable right out of the box and I did not experience any foot or leg discomfort during the break period. I began liking them the more I wore them. At day 31 I put my Brooks Adrenaline runners on. Within 15 mins I was aware of how unbalanced I was in that shoe and while walking around in my home said, I can’t wear these any more I have to put my Xero Shoes on. I swear I referred to them specifically. I have since purchased 2 pairs of the HFS model runners and they are my favorite shoe. I wear them every day. In my old shoes at the end of the day I would change to my slides, I literally have these on until I go to bed. Closest thing to walking barefoot and still having a shoe on.

reviews.title: If you like barefoot shoes give these a try.
reviews.text: I wear a size 11 in most running shoes. Ordered a 10 1/2 in this and it fits great. My feet are on wider side so shorter sizes work for me if the shoe is somewhat wide. Really comfortable and appears well made. I look forward to trying other models. Unlike many other barefoot manufacturers I didn’t see any irregularities in how the shoe was put together.

reviews.title: Comfortable as "bare foot" shoes
reviews.text: I have purchased 2 Xero Men's HFS Running Shoes - Zero Drop and I have been very happy and comfortable wearing them. I've successfully walked and run with them when I visited Philippines for a month and have gotten used to the "bare foot" concept. Although I'm still comfortable wearing my Adidas running shoes, I found myself to be wearing my bare foot shoes more often now as I really find them much lighter, comfortable (for bare foot shoes) and lighter/easier to pack on day or extended trips. I've only been wearing them for the last 2 months or so, so long term I would still need to see how they stand up.

reviews.title: Forms to feet
reviews.text: Really nice lightweight shoes that forms to feet rather than walking with slight incline on heel. One of the best work out shoes there are. Not for running or basket ball- in my opinion, though more for stretching, walking,  calisthenics, boxing or light aerobics.

reviews.text: Excellent running shoes. The fit is more on the tight side, but it definitely fits. I give it 4/5 stars because it's not quite as comfortable as the Adidas Duramo line which also has adiprene. However I have yet to run a lot in these so it may be better than Duramo in the long term, or for more intense running. Duramo's have extra padding that, while very comfortable, feels like it could eventually start to chafe. These have a more snug fit with no such padding, but are still very comfortable.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 4 Running Shoes
description:
The gt-2000 4 is the core runner’s bread and butter with its balance of cushioning and stability, outfitted by the comfortably supportive dynamic duomax and guidance trusstic system that also enhance gait efficiency. Our rear foot and forefoot gel cushioning systems are now even more adaptive, assisting mild to moderate over pronators alike with greater support, while the fluid ride midsole offers the ultimate ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Impact Guidance System (I.G.S): ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic duomax Support System: This evolution of duomax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid ride: fluid ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Truss tic System: This Truss tic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Great shoe for an over-pronator like me
reviews.text: I've used the GT-2000 shoes over the last few years and have yet to have issue with them. I over-pronate pretty badly and this shoe offers great support for that issue; My knees thank me. I found the shoe to fit exactly true to size and for those reviews that say it's small, people tend to forget that your feet swell when you run, especially longer distances! My personal size foot is between a 6.5-7 and I typically wear a 7 shoe for running, dress, or sandals. I can't say I know the difference between the GT-2000 model numbers (1-5?) except for new-ness. I have no issue with wearing older models and like the cheaper prices. For reference, I run half marathons several times a year on city sidewalks, asphalt, dirt roads, and dirt trails.

reviews.title: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, ...
reviews.text: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, hearsay- I am not sure of the exact fit. They are exchanging for a bigger size though.

reviews.title: Great shoe but runs small
reviews.text: Great shoe, very supportive in the arch and heel. I love the bright colors of the Asics shoes. The only thing I would be leary of is the size of the shoe. It runs small. I wear an 8 and because of other reviews, bought a 8-1/2. They fit but are still a little snug. After wearing for a bit, they will loosen up enough to be great. If you have a wider foot, you may not like these particular shoes.

reviews.title: Color in photo is not quite accurate
reviews.text: Have always loved my Asics GT-2000.  32 marathons and our relationship continues!  My only comment about this particular color combo is the photo appears to be grey and more coral color.  When they arrived what looks like a coral color in the photo is closer to fluorescent orange!  They are a bit "loud".  If they had been full price I probably would not have chosen them because of this.  Too "loud" for my preferences.  However, given the clearance price I'll make do!  :)

Secondly, they feel on the smaller side. I always wear an 8 1/2 in Nike, but then seem a little snug. I loosened the laces and wore them around the house and I guess I will get use to them.
Definately not my favorite pair of shoes, but I hate the hassle of returning in stuff, so will keep them and see how it goes.

reviews.text: Love the shoe but OMG the sizing is WAY OFF! I have ordered this shoe four times consecutively and each time they run SUPER SMALL. My 10 year old daughter wears a 6.5 and I have had to order a 9 after ordering a 7, 7.5 and an 8.5 and none of those fit her. I will update my review once the 9’s come in. We order shoes every 4-6 months and she loves Nikes but these are made in Vietnam versus her last pair made in India and the sizing couldn’t be more off! See photos!

title: AUGSUN 110pcs 1/4inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes…
features: stainless steel
【QUALITY MATERIAL】: Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women.
【PACKAGE INCLUDES】: Package includes 110 pieces spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.
【SIZE】: 6.35 mm (1/4 inch) in length, tapered and needle-shaped, which increases friction between the sole and the ground and prevents skidding.

【EASY TO USE & REPLACE SPIKES】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【PROVIDE GREAT DRIP FOR SPORTSMAN】: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints, long jump, running.

title: Skechers Men's Max Cushioning Premier Vantage-Performance Walking & Running Shoe Sneaker
description: Add more cushioned comfort and response to your run with the Skechers Max Cushioning Premier™. A cushioned comfort running and walking design on an ULTRA GO® cushioned platform. The company's success stems from it's high quality, diversified, and affordable product line that meets consumers' Various lifestyle needs. Since it's inception in 1992, the Skechers diverse product offering has grown from utility style boots to include seven Skechers brands and five uniquely branded fashion lines for men and women. Skechers is an award-winning global leader in lifestyle footwear offering shoes that appeal to trend-savvy men, women and kids everywhere. The brand's styles include the latest innovative athletic, casual and fashion sneakers as well as sandals and boots—with many collections featuring Skechers air-cooled memory foam insoles for added comfort. Plus, Skechers offers a range of slip-resistant work FOOTWEAR for men and women, as well as cool, fun, playful and lighted styles that boys and girls love. Always ahead of the fashion curve, Skechers has made its sport, casual and dress casual shoes essential to every closet.
features: fabric-and-synthetic
Imported
Man Made sole
Shaft measures approximately mid-top from arch
Add more cushioned comfort and response to your run with the Skechers Max Cushioning Premier. A cushioned comfort running and walking design on an ULTRA GO cushioned platform.

UPPER: Virtually seamless engineered mesh fabric upper provides breathability and comfort. Synthetic hot-melt overlays at toe, heel and laces for added stability. Lace up front. Side S logo. Contrast colored midsole trim and detail.
MIDSOLE CUSHION: Cushioned responsive ULTRA GO comfort platform. INSOLE CUSHION: Air Cooled Goga Mat running insole for cooling comfort.

OUTSOLE/BOTTOM: Lightweight, durable and flexible parametric web outsole provides multi-surface traction. Forefoot flex grooves aid in flexibility and promote a smooth transition. Mid-foot strike zone promotes efficiency in each stride.
MACHINE WASHABLE shoe design - wash on gentle cycle cold, hang to air dry. WEIGHT: 10.4 oz. per shoe in a men's size 9. OFFSET: 6mm heel drop height. HEEL: 2 inch heel height.

Cushy to the max!

reviews.title: A  wide walking shoe that wears out quickly above the big toes.
reviews.text: These shoes were great to walk in all day long.  Wide in the toe-box and best of all, they are washable!  My one concern is that this particular had laces that were too thin and too short so I replaced them with a longer and more wider pair of laces.  Lastly, after wearing the shoes for a few months, the area above the big toes began to rip open, rendering the shoes useless.  I am so disappointed with this action!  Don't but these shoes as they will wear out in just a few months.

title: ASICS Gel-Nimbus 19 Lite Show Men's Running Shoe
description: The GEL-Nimbus 19 shoe features our revolutionary FlyteFoam Technology, for optimal comfort and a responsive ride for the neutral runner. A gradient jacquard-mesh upper is strategically tightened or loosened in zones to allow the foot's natural motion. 3D printed overlays provide seamless support to the upper.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch
FlyteFoam Midsole Technology: Continuous cushioning with 50% the weight of traditional EVA.
Fluid Ride Midsole: Fluid Ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid Fit Upper: ASICS Fluid Fit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System Technology: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.

title: Saucony Men's Redeemer ISO Road Running Shoe
description:
High stability road running shoe, accomidates orthotics & overpronation
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Width denoters: D (Medium), E, 2E (Wide), 3E (X-Wide),

reviews.text: The width is substantially wider than stated. I wear a 2E, which is sometimes too tight, but the 2E in these shoes is far too wide for me, giving the space of a 4E or larger.

reviews.title: Rubbed my Achilles raw
reviews.text: Rubbed my heels raw. Husband and I bought these for hiking. We love everything about them except that they rubbed our heels raw. No padding or lining to protect your heels/Achilles and we worry socks. Perhaps ok if you are only going to be walking. However, we hike and hike mountains that are 7,000+ Ft. Great for earthing, building neuro pathways and feedback in feet.

title: ASICS Men's GEL Excite 3 Running Shoe
description:
The energetic design of the GEL-Excite™ 3 features a Rearfoot GEL® Cushioning System and breathable mesh upper for everyday comfort. This exciting update is a great choice for low mileage runners seeking a great fit and cushioned ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Low-mileage running shoe featuring rearfoot GEL cushioning and a removable sockliner that accommodates orthotics
AHAR high-abrasion rubber in critical areas of the outsole
Reflective overlays

reviews.title: Fantastic, would buy again
reviews.text: These shoes are fantastic. I was working all day in Skechers memory foam and switched to these. While these don't have the robust support those others did have, they are designed so much better for long usage. I can walk about 8 miles before I notice my feet to get tired. I wear them all day and for just about everything between work and running.

reviews.title: Hills are great, said no runner ever.

It's grounded in performance, but built for stand-out style.
